creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
Hi Sebastian,

This issue has appeared since Perl was bumped to 5.8.9 and doesn't  
affect every installation, like all of mine, so I am in no position to  
test your patch but I do agree that the original code isn't the nicest  
C I have seen.

I don't know what situation you are in to test net-mgmt/nagios-devel  
but that was recently updated to 3.1.0 (development) and claims to  
resolve many issues present in 3.0.6 (production).  If possible, I  
would be curious as to whether an install of that still causes the  
segmentation fault on the same system that 3.0.6 is having troubles.

Until I can replicate the fault or see confirmation (and a solution)  
from the Nagios folk, I am reluctant to approve this patch.  If you  
can provide me with more details of your system (offline, don't  
include bug-followup@) like system type, uname, dmesg, pkg_info, etc.  
I will see what correlation there is with the information other users  
have sent me thus far.

Jarrod.
